worldData.instructions:
THE GILDED HALL — an endless raymarched treasury, and something waits at the end of it.

W / A / S / D — walk (SHIFT to hurry). Move the mouse to look around.
CLICK or SPACE — hurl a fireball down your gaze.

The point: wander the columns and the hoards by torchlight. A dragon holds the far end of the hall, always just out of reach — land a fireball on it and it answers.

creation_brief.prompt: A hallway with roman columns filled with piles of gleaming gold super realistic.

stepHooks.author: claude
stepHooks.description: THE GILDED HALL v2: raymarched walk — head turns with the mouse, weighted

stepHooks.author: Claude (Fable 5)
stepHooks.description: walk + look + fireball spell + the dragon's anchor and roar
